steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What sound does the big farm animal make?
questions.hint: It sounds like it's saying Moo!

questions.question_text: What color are the big spots on the animal?
questions.hint: The animal has black and white spots!

questions.question_text: What does the animal eat in the video?
questions.hint: The big animal likes to munch in the field!

items.definition: Person who takes care of animals

items.example: That is a cow. It says Moo!

steps.title: On the Farm
steps.text: Look at the big farm. That is a cow. It says Moo. Is that a horse? Yes, it is! The farmer smiles.

steps.explanation: Use 'That is' for something far away.

steps.audio_text: Look at the big cow on the farm! It says Moo! Is the farmer walking with a horse?

questions.question: What sound does the big animal make?

steps.prompt: Point and Say: That is a horse.

questions.question_text: What animal says 'Moo' on the farm? (Vocabulary question)
That is a ___ on the field. (Grammar question)
Where does the farmer work? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: A cow is smaller than a horse. (Comprehension question)
What is the first word you hear in the sentence: 'That is a cow.'? (Grammar question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What color is the sheep in the video? 🐑
questions.hint: It's the same color as a fluffy cloud!

questions.question_text: What sound does a duck make? 🦆
What does the farmer wear? 👨‍🌾
questions.hint: It helps keep the sun off his head.

items.example: That is a sheep. It says baa.
Is that a duck? It says quack.

steps.title: Fun on the Farm
steps.text: That is a white sheep. Is that a duck? Yes, the duck can swim. It says quack! I love animals.

steps.explanation: Use to say what an animal is.

steps.audio_text: Look at the sheep! Is that a sheep eating grass? Yes, it is! The sheep is white.

questions.question_text: Is that a ___? (Fill in with 'sheep' or 'duck')
What color is the sheep? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: Ducks can swim.
What is the sheep doing? (Reading comprehension)
Is this sentence correct? 'Is that a sheep?'

lessons.title: Pig and Chicken
lessons.topic: Birds, pigs and animal sound recognition

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal says Moo on the farm?
What animal is pink and likes mud?
questions.hint: This animal makes an oink sound.

questions.question_text: Which bird on the farm lays eggs?
questions.hint: This bird says cluck and loves seeds.

items.example: That is a pig. It says Oink.
Is that a chicken? It says Cluck.
That is an egg from a chicken.
Look at the mud! Is that a pig in it?

steps.title: Farm Friends
steps.text: Look at the pig. It is very pink. The pig is in the mud. That is a chicken. Is that a chicken egg? The egg is big!

steps.explanation: Say what sound an animal makes.

steps.audio_text: Oink oink! That is a happy pig in the mud. Look, there is an egg on the grass!

questions.question: What sound does the pig make?

questions.question_text: It says ____: 'Cluck cluck!' (Grammar question)
What is in the mud? (Reading comprehension question)
True or False: An egg comes from a chicken. (Vocabulary question)
Which animal makes a sound 'Oink oink'? (Vocabulary question)

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: Which animal says 'oink' on the farm?
questions.hint: This animal loves mud and has a curly tail!

questions.question_text: Which animal gives us wool?
questions.hint: This animal is fluffy and says 'baa'!

questions.question_text: What animal goes 'cluck' and lays eggs?
questions.hint: This animal lives in a coop and has feathers!

steps.title: Morning on the Farm
steps.text: Good morning! I see the sun. That is a rooster. Is that a cow? It says Moo! The hen is laying eggs. I love my animals!

steps.audio_text: Look at the farm! There's a white sheep. It says baa. Oh, and here's a horse! It neighs loudly.

questions.question: What sound does the sheep make?

steps.prompt: Say: That is a cow. What does it say?
steps.expected_text: that is a cow it says moo

questions.question_text: Which animal says oink?
That is a ___ cow. (Grammar question)
True or False: A sheep says moo.
Is that a chicken? (Reading comprehension from lesson topic)
